title: Cobblemon Tools
description: Cobblemon Tools is the sidemod companion for the go to Cobblemon Pokedex website. Manage, create, import, and share teams & PokePastes in Cobblemon!
body:
**The Cobblemon Tools Sidemod** adds functionality to Cobblemon supported by [the Cobblemon Tools Website](https://cobblemon.tools/). This includes:
- Uploading your party as a ["Cobblemon Tools Team"](https://cobblemon.tools/teams)
- Downloading teams from Cobblemon Tools to use in game
- Downloading PokePastes directly in game

# Megastone Support in Team Shares!

![Cobblemon Tools Team Share Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d012f2322b1c96b60d9608d0bf3342fae8bd1212.png)

# Share your full team, an Open Team Sheet, or just the Pokemon for Tournaments!

![Team Upload Results](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12005670976e899531807ceb46b7c0753fbdd580.png)

![Open Team Sheet Share](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec5d7ffa188334bc3b6ed9fb62ffb1906517a9e.png)

### Commands/Permissions

- **/getTeam [team_id]** (permission: "cobblemontools.command.getteam")
> <team_id> is the Cobblemon Tools Team ID, for [this team](https://cobblemon.tools/teams/QpBHqlQwj6nP)'s ID is "QpBHqlQwj6nP"


>  this command will move your current party to your PC, and then put the Pokemon from the CT Team in your party


- **/uploadTeam [optional:team_name]** (permission: "cobblemontools.command.uploadteam")
> upload your party to Cobblemon Tools. Returns a link to your Team.


> optionally set the name here (it can also be changed on CT later)


- **/getPokePaste [pokepaste_url]** (permission: "cobblemontools.command.getpokepaste")
> same as /getTeam, but uses PokePaste URLs directly
